text.NRSV: Adam, Seth, Enosh;
text.Rotherham: Adam, Seth, Enosh:
text.KJV: Adam, Sheth, Enosh,
text.NABRE: I. Genealogical Tables Chapter 1 From Adam to Abraham. Adam, Seth, Enosh,
text.DRB: Adam, Seth, Enos,

text.NRSV: Kenan, Mahalalel, Jared;
text.Rotherham: Kenan, Mahalalel, Jared:
text.KJV: Kenan, Mahalaleel, Jered,
text.NABRE: Kenan, Mahalalel, Jared,
text.DRB: Cainan, Malaleel, Jared,

text.NRSV: Enoch, Methuselah, Lamech;
text.Rotherham: Enoch, Methuselah, Lamech:
text.KJV: Henoch, Methuselah, Lamech,
text.NABRE: Enoch, Methuselah, Lamech,
text.DRB: Henoch, Mathusale, Lamech,

text.NRSV: Noah, Shem, Ham, and Japheth.
text.Rotherham: Noah, Shem, Ham, and Japheth.
text.KJV: Noah, Shem, Ham, and Japheth.
text.NABRE: Noah, Shem, Ham, and Japheth.
text.DRB: Noe, Sem, Cham, and Japheth.

text.NRSV: The sons of Japheth: Gomer, Magog, Madai, Javan, Tubal, Meshech, and Tiras.
text.Rotherham: The sons of Japheth, Gomer, and Magog, and Madai, and Javan, and Tubal, and Meshech and Tiras.
text.KJV: The sons of Japheth; Gomer, and Magog, and Madai, and Javan, and Tubal, and Meshech, and Tiras.
text.NABRE: The sons of Japheth were Gomer, Magog, Madai, Javan, Tubal, Meshech, and Tiras.
text.DRB: The sons of Japheth: Gomer, and Magog, & Madai, and Javan, Thubal, Mosoch, Thiras.

text.NRSV: The sons of Gomer: Ashkenaz, Diphath, and Togarmah.
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Gomer, Ashkenaz, and Diphath, and Togarmah.
text.KJV: And the sons of Gomer; Ashchenaz, and Riphath, and Togarmah.
text.NABRE: The sons of Gomer were Ashkenaz, Riphath, and Togarmah.
text.DRB: Moreover the sons of Gomer: Ascenez, and Riphath, and Thogorma.

text.NRSV: The sons of Javan: Elishah, Tarshish, Kittim, and Rodanim.
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Javan, Elishah, and Tarshish,—Kittim, and Rodanim.
text.KJV: And the sons of Javan; Elishah, and Tarshish, Kittim, and Dodanim.
text.NABRE: The sons of Javan were Elishah, Tarshish, the Kittim, and the Rodanim.
text.DRB: And the sons of Javan: Elisa and Tharsis, Cethim and Dodanim.

text.NRSV: The sons of Ham: Cush, Egypt, Put, and Canaan.
text.Rotherham: The sons of Ham, Cush, and Mizraim, Put, and Canaan.
text.KJV: The sons of Ham; Cush, and Mizraim, Put, and Canaan.
text.NABRE: The sons of Ham were Cush, Mizraim, Put, and Canaan.
text.DRB: The sons of Cham: Chus, and Mesraim, and Phut, and Chanaan.

text.NRSV: The sons of Cush: Seba, Havilah, Sabta, Raamah, and Sabteca. The sons of Raamah: Sheba and Dedan.
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Cush, Seba, and Havilah, and Sabta, and Raama, and Sabteca. And, the sons of Raamah, Sheba, and Dedan.
text.KJV: And the sons of Cush; Seba, and Havilah, and Sabta, and Raamah, and Sabtecha. And the sons of Raamah; Sheba, and Dedan.
text.NABRE: The sons of Cush were Seba, Havilah, Sabta, Raama, and Sabteca. The sons of Raama were Sheba and Dedan.
text.DRB: And the sons of Chus: Saba, and Hevila, Sabatha, and Regma, and Sabathaca. Moreover the sons of Regma: Saba, and Dadan.

text.NRSV: Cush became the father of Nimrod; he was the first to be a mighty one on the earth.
text.Rotherham: And, Cush, begat Nimrod,—he, began to be a mighty one in the earth.
text.KJV: And Cush begat Nimrod: he began to be mighty upon the earth.
text.NABRE: Cush became the father of Nimrod, who was the first to be a warrior on the earth.
text.DRB: And Chus begat Nemrod: this began to be mighty in the earth.

text.NRSV: Egypt became the father of Ludim, Anamim, Lehabim, Naphtuhim,
text.Rotherham: And, Mizraim, begat Ludim, and Anamim, and Lehabim, and Naphtuhim,
text.KJV: And Mizraim begat Ludim, and Anamim, and Lehabim, and Naphtuhim,
text.NABRE: Mizraim became the father of the Ludim, Anamim, Lehabim, Naphtuhim,
text.DRB: But Mesraim begat Ludim, and Anamim, and Laabim, and Nephtuim,

text.NRSV: Pathrusim, Casluhim (from whom the Philistines come), and Caphtorim.
text.Rotherham: and Pathrusim, and Casluhim—whence went forth the Philistines, and Caphtorim.
text.KJV: And Pathrusim, and Casluhim, (of whom came the Philistines,) and Caphthorim.
text.NABRE: Pathrusim, Casluhim, and Caphtorim, from whom the Philistines sprang.
text.DRB: Phetrusim also, and Casluim: from whom came Philisthiim, & Caphthorim.

text.NRSV: Canaan became the father of Sidon his firstborn, and Heth,
text.Rotherham: And, Canaan, begat Zidon his firstborn, and Heth;
text.KJV: And Canaan begat Zidon his firstborn, and Heth,
text.NABRE: Canaan became the father of Sidon, his firstborn, and Heth,
text.DRB: But Chanaan begat Sidon his firstborn, the Hetheite also,

text.NRSV: and the Jebusites, the Amorites, the Girgashites,
text.Rotherham: and the Jebusite, and the Amorite, and the Girgashite;
text.KJV: The Jebusite also, and the Amorite, and the Girgashite,
text.NABRE: and the Jebusites, the Amorites, the Girgashites,
text.DRB: and the Jebuseite, and the Amorrhite, and the Gergesite,

text.NRSV: the Hivites, the Arkites, the Sinites,
text.Rotherham: and the Hivite, and the Arkite, and the Sinite;
text.KJV: And the Hivite, and the Arkite, and the Sinite,
text.NABRE: the Hivites, the Arkites, the Sinites,
text.DRB: & the Heveite, & the Aracite, & the Sinite.

text.NRSV: the Arvadites, the Zemarites, and the Hamathites.
text.Rotherham: and the Arvadite, and the Zemarite, and the Hamathite.
text.KJV: And the Arvadite, and the Zemarite, and the Hamathite.
text.NABRE: the Arvadites, the Zemarites, and the Hamathites.
text.DRB: The Aradium also, and the Samarite, & the Hamathite.

text.NRSV: The sons of Shem: Elam, Asshur, Arpachshad, Lud, Aram, Uz, Hul, Gether, and Meshech.
text.Rotherham: The sons of Shem, Elam, and Asshur, and Arpachshad, and Lud, and Aram,—and Uz, and Hul, and Gethur, and Meshech.
text.KJV: The sons of Shem; Elam, and Asshur, and Arphaxad, and Lud, and Aram, and Uz, and Hul, and Gether, and Meshech.
text.NABRE: The sons of Shem were Elam, Asshur, Arpachshad, Lud, and Aram. The sons of Aram were Uz, Hul, Gether, and Mash.
text.DRB: The sons of Sem: Ælam, and Assur, and Arphaxad, and Lud, and Aram, & Hus, and Hul, and Gether, and Mosoch.

text.NRSV: Arpachshad became the father of Shelah; and Shelah became the father of Eber.
text.Rotherham: And, Arpachshad, begat Shelah,—and, Shelah, begat Eber.
text.KJV: And Arphaxad begat Shelah, and Shelah begat Eber.
text.NABRE: Arpachshad became the father of Shelah, and Shelah became the father of Eber.
text.DRB: And Arphaxad begat Sale, who also begat Heber.

text.NRSV: To Eber were born two sons: the name of the one was Peleg (for in his days the earth was divided), and the name of his brother Joktan.
text.Rotherham: And, unto Eber, were born two sons,—the name of the one, was Peleg, for, in his days, was the earth divided, and, the name of his brother, was Joktan.
text.KJV: And unto Eber were born two sons: the name of the one was Peleg; because in his days the earth was divided: and his brother’s name was Joktan.
text.NABRE: Two sons were born to Eber; the first was named Peleg (for in his time the world was divided), and his brother was named Joktan.
text.DRB: Moreover to Heber were born two sons, the name of one was Phaleg, because in his days the earth was divided; and the name of his brother Jectan.

text.NRSV: Joktan became the father of Almodad, Sheleph, Hazarmaveth, Jerah,
text.Rotherham: And, Joktan, begat Almodad, and Sheleph,—and Hazarmaveth, and Jerah;
text.KJV: And Joktan begat Almodad, and Sheleph, and Hazarmaveth, and Jerah,
text.NABRE: Joktan became the father of Almodad, Sheleph, Hazarmaveth, Jerah,
text.DRB: And Jectan begat Elmodad, & Saleph, and Asarmoth, and Jare,

text.NRSV: Hadoram, Uzal, Diklah,
text.Rotherham: and Hadoram, and Uzal, and Diklah;
text.KJV: Hadoram also, and Uzal, and Diklah,
text.NABRE: Hadoram, Uzal, Diklah,
text.DRB: Adoram also, and Usal, and Decla,

text.NRSV: Ebal, Abimael, Sheba,
text.Rotherham: and Ebal, and Abimael, and Sheba;
text.KJV: And Ebal, and Abimael, and Sheba,
text.NABRE: Ebal, Abimael, Sheba,
text.DRB: Hebal also, and Abimael, and Saba, moreover

text.NRSV: Ophir, Havilah, and Jobab; all these were the sons of Joktan.
text.Rotherham: and Ophir, and Havilah, and Jobab. All these, were the sons of Joktan.
text.KJV: And Ophir, and Havilah, and Jobab. All these were the sons of Joktan.
text.NABRE: Ophir, Havilah, and Jobab; all these were the sons of Joktan.
text.DRB: also Ophir, and Hevila, and Jobab. All these are the sons of Jectan:

text.NRSV: Shem, Arpachshad, Shelah;
text.Rotherham: Shem, Arpachshad, Shelah;
text.KJV: Shem, Arphaxad, Shelah,
text.NABRE: Shem, Arpachshad, Shelah,
text.DRB: Sem, Arphaxad, Sale,

text.NRSV: Eber, Peleg, Reu;
text.Rotherham: Eber, Peleg, Reu;
text.KJV: Eber, Peleg, Reu,
text.NABRE: Eber, Peleg, Reu,
text.DRB: Heber, Phaleg, Ragau,

text.NRSV: Serug, Nahor, Terah;
text.Rotherham: Serug, Nahor, Terah;
text.KJV: Serug, Nahor, Terah,
text.NABRE: Serug, Nahor, Terah,
text.DRB: Serug, Nachor, Thare,

text.NRSV: Abram, that is, Abraham.
text.Rotherham: Abram—the same, is Abraham.
text.KJV: Abram; the same is Abraham.
text.NABRE: Abram, that is, Abraham.
text.DRB: Abram, this is Abraham.

text.NRSV: The sons of Abraham: Isaac and Ishmael.
text.Rotherham: The sons of Abraham, Isaac and Ishmael.
text.KJV: The sons of Abraham; Isaac, and Ishmael.
text.NABRE: From Abraham to Jacob. The sons of Abraham were Isaac and Ishmael.
text.DRB: And the sons of Abraham, Isaac and Ismael.

text.NRSV: These are their genealogies: the firstborn of Ishmael, Nebaioth; and Kedar, Adbeel, Mibsam,
text.Rotherham: These, are their generations,—the firstborn of Ishmael, Nebaioth, then Kedar, and Adbeel, and Mibsam;
text.KJV: These are their generations: The firstborn of Ishmael, Nebaioth; then Kedar, and Adbeel, and Mibsam,
text.NABRE: These were their generations: Nebaioth, the firstborn of Ishmael, then Kedar, Adbeel, Mibsam,
text.DRB: And these are the generations of them. The first-begotten of Ismael, Nabajoth, and Cedar, and Adbeel, and Mabsam,

text.NRSV: Mishma, Dumah, Massa, Hadad, Tema,
text.Rotherham: Mishma, and Dumah, Massa, Hadad, and Tema;
text.KJV: Mishma, and Dumah, Massa, Hadad, and Tema,
text.NABRE: Mishma, Dumah, Massa, Hadad, Tema,
text.DRB: and Masma, and Duma, Massa, Hadad, and Thema,

text.NRSV: Jetur, Naphish, and Kedemah. These are the sons of Ishmael.
text.Rotherham: Jetur, Naphish, and Kedemah. These, are the sons of Ishmael.
text.KJV: Jetur, Naphish, and Kedemah. These are the sons of Ishmael.
text.NABRE: Jetur, Naphish, and Kedemah. These were the sons of Ishmael.
text.DRB: Jetur, Naphis, Cedma. These are the sons of Ismahel.

text.NRSV: The sons of Keturah, Abraham’s concubine: she bore Zimran, Jokshan, Medan, Midian, Ishbak, and Shuah. The sons of Jokshan: Sheba and Dedan.
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Keturah, the concubine of Abraham, she bare Zimran, and Jokshan, and Medan, and Midian, and Ishbak, and Shuah,—and, the sons of Jokshan, Sheba, and Dedan;
text.KJV: Now the sons of Keturah, Abraham’s concubine: she bare Zimran, and Jokshan, and Medan, and Midian, and Ishbak, and Shuah. And the sons of Jokshan; Sheba, and Dedan.
text.NABRE: The sons of Keturah, Abraham’s concubine: she bore Zimran, Jokshan, Medan, Midian, Ishbak, and Shuah. The sons of Jokshan were Sheba and Dedan.
text.DRB: And the sons of Cetura Abraham's concubine, which she bare: Zamran, Jecsan, Madan, Madian, Jesboc, and Sue. Moreover the sons of Jecsan: Saba, and Dadan. And the sons of Dadan: Assurim, and Latussim, and Laomim.

text.NRSV: The sons of Midian: Ephah, Epher, Hanoch, Abida, and Eldaah. All these were the descendants of Keturah.
text.Rotherham: and, the sons of Midian, Ephah, and Epher, and Hanoch, and Abida, and Eldaah. All these, were the sons of Keturah.
text.KJV: And the sons of Midian; Ephah, and Epher, and Henoch, and Abida, and Eldaah. All these are the sons of Keturah.
text.NABRE: The sons of Midian were Ephah, Epher, Hanoch, Abida, and Eldaah. All these were the sons of Keturah.
text.DRB: And the sons of Madian: Epha, and Epher, and Henoch, and Abida, and Eldaa. All these the sons of Cetura.

text.NRSV: Abraham became the father of Isaac. The sons of Isaac: Esau and Israel.
text.Rotherham: So then Abraham begat Isaac,—the sons of Isaac, were Esau and Israel.
text.KJV: And Abraham begat Isaac. The sons of Isaac; Esau and Israel.
text.NABRE: Abraham begot Isaac. The sons of Isaac were Esau and Israel.
text.DRB: And Abraham begat Isaac: whose sons were Esau, and Israel.

text.NRSV: The sons of Esau: Eliphaz, Reuel, Jeush, Jalam, and Korah.
text.Rotherham: the sons of Esau, Eliphaz, Reuel, and Jeush, and Jalam, and Korah.
text.KJV: The sons of Esau; Eliphaz, Reuel, and Jeush, and Jaalam, and Korah.
text.NABRE: The descendants of Esau were Eliphaz, Reuel, Jeush, Jalam, and Korah.
text.DRB: The sons of Esau: Eliphaz, Rahuel, Jehus, Ihelom, and Core.

text.NRSV: The sons of Eliphaz: Teman, Omar, Zephi, Gatam, Kenaz, Timna, and Amalek.
text.Rotherham: The sons of Eliphaz, Teman, and Omar, Zephi, and Gatam, Kenaz, and Timna, and Amalek.
text.KJV: The sons of Eliphaz; Teman, and Omar, Zephi, and Gatam, Kenaz, and Timna, and Amalek.
text.NABRE: The descendants of Eliphaz were Teman, Omar, Zephi, Gatam, Kenaz, Timna, and Amalek.
text.DRB: The sons of Eliphaz: Theman, Omar, Sephi, Gathan, Cenez, Thamna, Amalec.

text.NRSV: The sons of Reuel: Nahath, Zerah, Shammah, and Mizzah.
text.Rotherham: The sons of Reuel, Nahath, Zerah, Shammah, and Mizzah.
text.KJV: The sons of Reuel; Nahath, Zerah, Shammah, and Mizzah.
text.NABRE: The descendants of Reuel were Nahath, Zerah, Shammah, and Mizzah.
text.DRB: The sons of Rahuel: Nahath, Zaza, Samma, Meza.

text.NRSV: The sons of Seir: Lotan, Shobal, Zibeon, Anah, Dishon, Ezer, and Dishan.
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Seir, Lotan, and Shobal, and Zibeon, and Anah,—and Dishon, and Ezer, and Dishan.
text.KJV: And the sons of Seir; Lotan, and Shobal, and Zibeon, and Anah, and Dishon, and Ezer, and Dishan.
text.NABRE: The sons of Seir were Lotan, Shobal, Zibeon, Anah, Dishon, Ezer, and Dishan.
text.DRB: The sons of Seir: Lotan, Sobal, Sebeon, Ana, Dison, Eser, Disan.

text.NRSV: The sons of Lotan: Hori and Homam; and Lotan’s sister was Timna.
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Lotan, Hori, and Homam,—and, Lotan’s sister, was Timna.
text.KJV: And the sons of Lotan; Hori, and Homam: and Timna was Lotan’s sister.
text.NABRE: The sons of Lotan were Hori and Homam; Timna was the sister of Lotan.
text.DRB: The sons of Lotan: Hori, Homam. And the sister of Lotan was Thamna.

text.NRSV: The sons of Shobal: Alian, Manahath, Ebal, Shephi, and Onam. The sons of Zibeon: Aiah and Anah.
text.Rotherham: The sons of Shobal, Alian, and Manahath, and Ebal, Shephi and Onam. And, the sons of Zibeon, Aiah and Anah.
text.KJV: The sons of Shobal; Alian, and Manahath, and Ebal, Shephi, and Onam. And the sons of Zibeon; Aiah, and Anah.
text.NABRE: The sons of Shobal were Alian, Manahath, Ebal, Shephi, and Onam. The sons of Zibeon were Aiah and Anah.
text.DRB: The sons of Sobal: Alian, and Manahath, and Ebal, Sephi, and Onam. The sons of Sebeon: Aia and Ana. The sons of Ana: Dison.

text.NRSV: The sons of Anah: Dishon. The sons of Dishon: Hamran, Eshban, Ithran, and Cheran.
text.Rotherham: The sons of Anah, Dishon,—and, the sons of Dishon, Hamran, and Eshban, and Ithran, and Cheran.
text.KJV: The sons of Anah; Dishon. And the sons of Dishon; Amram, and Eshban, and Ithran, and Cheran.
text.NABRE: The sons of Anah: Dishon. The sons of Dishon were Hemdan, Eshban, Ithran, and Cheran.
text.DRB: The sons of Dison: Hamram, and Eseban, and Jethran, and Charan.

text.NRSV: The sons of Ezer: Bilhan, Zaavan, and Jaakan. The sons of Dishan: Uz and Aran.
text.Rotherham: The sons of Ezer, Bilhan, and Zaavan, Jaakan. The sons of Dishan, Uz and Aran.
text.KJV: The sons of Ezer; Bilhan, and Zavan, and Jakan. The sons of Dishan; Uz, and Aran.
text.NABRE: The sons of Ezer were Bilhan, Zaavan, and Jaakan. The sons of Dishan were Uz and Aran.
text.DRB: The sons of Eser: Balaan, and Zavan, and Jacan. The sons of Disan: Hus and Aran.

text.NRSV: These are the kings who reigned in the land of Edom before any king reigned over the Israelites: Bela son of Beor, the name of whose city was Dinhabah.
text.Rotherham: Now, these, are the kings, who reigned in the land of Edom, before there reigned a king of the sons of Israel,—Bela the son of Beor, and, the name of his city, was Dinhabah.
text.KJV: Now these are the kings that reigned in the land of Edom before any king reigned over the children of Israel; Bela the son of Beor: and the name of his city was Dinhabah.
text.NABRE: The kings who reigned in the land of Edom before the Israelites had kings were the following: Bela, son of Beor, the name of whose city was Dinhabah.
text.DRB: These be the kings, that reigned in the Land of Edom, before there was a king over the children of Israel: Bale the son of Beor: and the name of his city, Denaba.

text.NRSV: When Bela died, Jobab son of Zerah of Bozrah succeeded him.
text.Rotherham: And Bela died,—and there reigned in his stead, Jobab son of Zerah, of Bozrah.
text.KJV: And when Bela was dead, Jobab the son of Zerah of Bozrah reigned in his stead.
text.NABRE: When Bela died, Jobab, son of Zerah, from Bozrah, succeeded him as king.
text.DRB: And Bale died, and Jobab the son of Zare of Bosra, reigned for him.

text.NRSV: When Jobab died, Husham of the land of the Temanites succeeded him.
text.Rotherham: And Jobab died,—and there reigned in his stead, Husham, of the land of the Temanites.
text.KJV: And when Jobab was dead, Husham of the land of the Temanites reigned in his stead.
text.NABRE: When Jobab died, Husham, from the land of the Temanites, succeeded him as king.
text.DRB: And when Jobab also was dead, Husam of the Land of the Themanes reigned for him.

text.NRSV: When Husham died, Hadad son of Bedad, who defeated Midian in the country of Moab, succeeded him; the name of his city was Avith.
text.Rotherham: And Husham died,—and there reigned in his stead, Hadad the son of Bedad, who smote Midian in the field of Moab, and, the name of his city, was Avith.
text.KJV: And when Husham was dead, Hadad the son of Bedad, which smote Midian in the field of Moab, reigned in his stead: and the name of his city was Avith.
text.NABRE: Husham died and Hadad, son of Bedad, succeeded him as king. He overthrew the Midianites on the Moabite plateau, and the name of his city was Avith.
text.DRB: And Husam also died, and Adad the son of Badad reigned for him, who struck Madian in the Land of Moab: and the name of his city was Avith.

text.NRSV: When Hadad died, Samlah of Masrekah succeeded him.
text.Rotherham: And Hadad died,—and there reigned in his stead, Samlah of Masrekah.
text.KJV: And when Hadad was dead, Samlah of Masrekah reigned in his stead.
text.NABRE: Hadad died and Samlah of Masrekah succeeded him as king.
text.DRB: And when Adad also was dead, Semla of Masreca reigned for him.

text.NRSV: When Samlah died, Shaul of Rehoboth on the Euphrates succeeded him.
text.Rotherham: And Samlah died,—and there reigned in his stead, Shaul, of Rehoboth by the River.
text.KJV: And when Samlah was dead, Shaul of Rehoboth by the river reigned in his stead.
text.NABRE: Samlah died and Shaul from Rehoboth on the Euphrates succeeded him as king.
text.DRB: But Semla also died, and there reigned for him Saul of Rohoboth, which is situate besides the river.

text.NRSV: When Shaul died, Baal-hanan son of Achbor succeeded him.
text.Rotherham: And Shaul died,—and there reigned in his stead, Baal-hanan, the son of Achbor.
text.KJV: And when Shaul was dead, Baal–hanan the son of Achbor reigned in his stead.
text.NABRE: When Shaul died, Baalhanan, son of Achbor, succeeded him as king.
text.DRB: Saul also being dead, Balanan, the son of Achobor reigned for him.

text.NRSV: When Baal-hanan died, Hadad succeeded him; the name of his city was Pai, and his wife’s name Mehetabel daughter of Matred, daughter of Mezahab.
text.Rotherham: And Baal-hanan died,—and there reigned in his stead, Hadad, and, the name of his city, was Pai,—and, the name of his wife, was Mehetabel, daughter of Matred, daughter of Mezahab.
text.KJV: And when Baal–hanan was dead, Hadad reigned in his stead: and the name of his city was Pai; and his wife’s name was Mehetabel, the daughter of Matred, the daughter of Mezahab.
text.NABRE: Baalhanan died and Hadad succeeded him as king. The name of his city was Pai, and his wife’s name was Mehetabel. She was the daughter of Matred, who was the daughter of Mezahab.
text.DRB: But this also died, and Adad reigned for him: whose city's name was Phau, and his wife was called Meetabel the daughter of Matred, the daughter of Mezaab.

text.NRSV: And Hadad died. The clans of Edom were: clans Timna, Alvah, Jetheth,
text.Rotherham: And Hadad died. And there were chiefs of Edom: chief Timna, chief Aliah, chief Jetheth;
text.KJV: Hadad died also. And the dukes of Edom were; duke Timnah, duke Aliah, duke Jetheth,
text.NABRE: After Hadad died, there were chiefs in Edom: the chiefs of Timna, Aliah, Jetheth,
text.DRB: And Adad being dead, there began to be dukes in Edom for kings: duke Thamna, duke Alva, duke Jetheth,

text.NRSV: Oholibamah, Elah, Pinon,
text.Rotherham: chief Oholibamah, chief Elah, chief Pinon;
text.KJV: Duke Aholibamah, duke Elah, duke Pinon,
text.NABRE: Oholibamah, Elah, Pinon,
text.DRB: duke Oolibama, duke Ela, duke Phinon,

text.NRSV: Kenaz, Teman, Mibzar,
text.Rotherham: chief Kenaz, chief Teman, chief Mibzar;
text.KJV: Duke Kenaz, duke Teman, duke Mibzar,
text.NABRE: Kenaz, Teman, Mibzar,
text.DRB: duke Cenez, duke Theman, duke Mabsar,

text.NRSV: Magdiel, and Iram; these are the clans of Edom.
text.Rotherham: chief Magdiel, chief Iram. These, were the chiefs of Edom.
text.KJV: Duke Magdiel, duke Iram. These are the dukes of Edom.
text.NABRE: Magdiel, and Iram were the chiefs of Edom.
text.DRB: duke Magdiel, duke Hiram. These be the dukes of Edom.

text.NRSV: These are the sons of Israel: Reuben, Simeon, Levi, Judah, Issachar, Zebulun,
text.Rotherham: These, are the sons of Israel,—Reuben, Simeon, Levi, and Judah, Issachar, and Zebulun;
text.KJV: These are the sons of Israel; Reuben, Simeon, Levi, and Judah, Issachar, and Zebulun,
text.NABRE: Chapter 2 These were the sons of Israel: Reuben, Simeon, Levi, Judah, Issachar, Zebulun,
text.DRB: And the children of Israel: Ruben, Simeon, Levi, Juda, Issachar, and Zabulon,

text.NRSV: Dan, Joseph, Benjamin, Naphtali, Gad, and Asher.
text.Rotherham: Dan, Joseph, and Benjamin, Naphtali, Gad, and Asher,
text.KJV: Dan, Joseph, and Benjamin, Naphtali, Gad, and Asher.
text.NABRE: Dan, Joseph, Benjamin, Naphtali, Gad, and Asher.
text.DRB: Dan, Joseph, Benjamin, Nephthali, Gad, and Aser.

text.NRSV: The sons of Judah: Er, Onan, and Shelah; these three Bath-shua the Canaanite bore to him. Now Er, Judah’s firstborn, was wicked in the sight of the Lord, and he put him to death.
text.Rotherham: the sons of Judah, Er, and Onan, and Shelah, the three born to him of the daughter of Shua the Canaanitess,—but Er the firstborn of Judah became wicked in the eyes of Yahweh, and he slew him.
text.KJV: The sons of Judah; Er, and Onan, and Shelah: which three were born unto him of the daughter of Shua the Canaanitess. And Er, the firstborn of Judah, was evil in the sight of the Lord; and he slew him.
text.NABRE: Judah. The sons of Judah were: Er, Onan, and Shelah; these three Bathshua, a Canaanite woman, bore to him. But Judah’s firstborn, Er, was wicked in the sight of the Lord, so he took his life.
text.DRB: The sons of Juda: Her, Onan, and Sela, these three were born to him of the Chananite the daughter of Sue. And Her the first-begotten of Juda, was evil before our Lord, & he slew him.

text.NRSV: His daughter-in-law Tamar also bore him Perez and Zerah. Judah had five sons in all.
text.Rotherham: And, Tamar his daughter-in-law, bare him, Perez and Zerah. All the sons of Judah, were five.
text.KJV: And Tamar his daughter in law bare him Pharez and Zerah. All the sons of Judah were five.
text.NABRE: Judah’s daughter-in-law Tamar bore him Perez and Zerah, so that he had five sons in all.
text.DRB: And Thamar his daughter in law bare him Phares and Zara.

text.NRSV: The sons of Perez: Hezron and Hamul.
text.Rotherham: The sons of Perez, Hezron and Hamul.
text.KJV: The sons of Pharez; Hezron, and Hamul.
text.NABRE: The sons of Perez were Hezron and Hamul.
text.DRB: Therefore all the sons of Juda, were five. And the sons of Phares, Hesron and Hamul.

text.NRSV: The sons of Zerah: Zimri, Ethan, Heman, Calcol, and Dara, five in all.
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Zerah, Zimri and Ethan, and Heman and Calcol and Dara, all of them, five.
text.KJV: And the sons of Zerah; Zimri, and Ethan, and Heman, and Calcol, and Dara: five of them in all.
text.NABRE: The sons of Zerah were Zimri, Ethan, Heman, Calcol, and Darda—five in all.
text.DRB: The sons also of Zara: Zamri, & Ethan, and Eman, Chalcal also, and Dara, together five.

text.NRSV: The sons of Carmi: Achar, the troubler of Israel, who transgressed in the matter of the devoted thing;
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Carmi, Achar, the troubler of Israel, who transgressed in a thing devoted.
text.KJV: And the sons of Carmi; Achar, the troubler of Israel, who transgressed in the thing accursed.
text.NABRE: The sons of Zimri: Carmi. The sons of Carmi: Achar, who brought trouble upon Israel by violating the ban.
text.DRB: And the sons of Charmi: Achar, who troubled Israel, and sinned in the theft of the anathema.

text.NRSV: and Ethan’s son was Azariah.
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Ethan, Azariah.
text.KJV: And the sons of Ethan; Azariah.
text.NABRE: The sons of Ethan: Azariah.
text.DRB: The sons of Ethan: Azarias.

text.NRSV: The sons of Hezron, who were born to him: Jerahmeel, Ram, and Chelubai.
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Hezron, who were born to him, Jerahmeel, and Ram, and Calubai.
text.KJV: The sons also of Hezron, that were born unto him; Jerahmeel, and Ram, and Chelubai.
text.NABRE: The sons born to Hezron were Jerahmeel, Ram, and Chelubai.
text.DRB: And the sons of Hesron that were born to him: Jerameel, & Ram, & Calubi.

text.NRSV: Ram became the father of Amminadab, and Amminadab became the father of Nahshon, prince of the sons of Judah.
text.Rotherham: And, Ram, begat Amminadab,—and, Amminadab, begat Nahshon, leader of the sons of Judah.
text.KJV: And Ram begat Amminadab; and Amminadab begat Nahshon, prince of the children of Judah;
text.NABRE: Ram became the father of Amminadab, and Amminadab became the father of Nahshon, a prince of the Judahites.
text.DRB: Moreover Ram begat Aminadab, & Aminadab begat Nahasson, the Prince of the children of Juda.

text.NRSV: Nahshon became the father of Salma, Salma became the father of Boaz,
text.Rotherham: And, Nahshon, begat Salma, and, Salma, begat Boaz;
text.KJV: And Nahshon begat Salma, and Salma begat Boaz,
text.NABRE: Nahshon became the father of Salmah. Salmah became the father of Boaz.
text.DRB: Nahasson also begat Salma, of whom was born Booz.

text.NRSV: Boaz became the father of Obed, Obed became the father of Jesse.
text.Rotherham: and, Boaz, begat Obed, and, Obed, begat Jesse;
text.KJV: And Boaz begat Obed, and Obed begat Jesse,
text.NABRE: Boaz became the father of Obed. Obed became the father of Jesse.
text.DRB: But Booz begat Obed, who also begat Isai.

text.NRSV: Jesse became the father of Eliab his firstborn, Abinadab the second, Shimea the third,
text.Rotherham: and, Jesse, begat—his firstborn, Eliab,—and Abinadab, the second, and Shimea, the third;
text.KJV: And Jesse begat his firstborn Eliab, and Abinadab the second, and Shimma the third,
text.NABRE: Jesse became the father of Eliab, his firstborn, of Abinadab, the second son, Shimea, the third,
text.DRB: And Isai begat the first-begotten Eliab, the second Abinadab, the third Simmaa,

text.NRSV: Nethanel the fourth, Raddai the fifth,
text.Rotherham: Nethanel, the fourth, Raddai, the fifth;
text.KJV: Nethaneel the fourth, Raddai the fifth,
text.NABRE: Nethanel, the fourth, Raddai, the fifth,
text.DRB: the fourth, Nathanael, the fifth Raddai,

text.NRSV: Ozem the sixth, David the seventh;
text.Rotherham: Ozem, the sixth, David, the seventh.
text.KJV: Ozem the sixth, David the seventh:
text.NABRE: Ozem, the sixth, and David, the seventh.
text.DRB: the sixth Asom, the seventh David.

text.NRSV: and their sisters were Zeruiah and Abigail. The sons of Zeruiah: Abishai, Joab, and Asahel, three.
text.Rotherham: And, their sisters, were Zeruiah and Abigail,—and, the sons of Zeruiah, Abishai and Joab and Asahel, three,
text.KJV: Whose sisters were Zeruiah, and Abigail. And the sons of Zeruiah; Abishai, and Joab, and Asahel, three.
text.NABRE: Their sisters were Zeruiah and Abigail. Zeruiah had three sons: Abishai, Joab, and Asahel.
text.DRB: Whose sisters were Sarvia, & Abigail. The sons of Sarvia: Abisai, Joab, and Asael, three.

text.NRSV: Abigail bore Amasa, and the father of Amasa was Jether the Ishmaelite.
text.Rotherham: And, Abigail, bare Amasa,—and, the father of Amasa, was Jether the Ishmaelite.
text.KJV: And Abigail bare Amasa: and the father of Amasa was Jether the Ishmeelite.
text.NABRE: Abigail bore Amasa, whose father was Jether the Ishmaelite.
text.DRB: And Abigail bear Amasa, whose father was Jether the Ismaelite.

text.NRSV: Caleb son of Hezron had children by his wife Azubah, and by Jerioth; these were her sons: Jesher, Shobab, and Ardon.
text.Rotherham: And, Caleb son of Hezron, begat children of Azubah his wife, and of Jerioth,—and, these, were her sons, Jesher and Shobab and Ardon.
text.KJV: And Caleb the son of Hezron begat children of Azubah his wife, and of Jerioth: her sons are these; Jesher, and Shobab, and Ardon.
text.NABRE: By his wife Azubah, Caleb, son of Hezron, became the father of a daughter, Jerioth. Her sons were Jesher, Shobab, and Ardon.
text.DRB: But Caleb the son of Hesron took a wife named Azuba, of whom he begat Jerioth: and her sons were Jaser, and Sobab, and Ardon.

text.NRSV: When Azubah died, Caleb married Ephrath, who bore him Hur.
text.Rotherham: And Azubah died,—and Caleb took unto him Ephrath, and she bare to him Hur.
text.KJV: And when Azubah was dead, Caleb took unto him Ephrath, which bare him Hur.
text.NABRE: When Azubah died, Caleb married Ephrath, who bore him Hur.
text.DRB: And when Azuba was dead, Caleb took to wife Ephratha: who bare him Hur.

text.NRSV: Hur became the father of Uri, and Uri became the father of Bezalel.
text.Rotherham: And, Hur, begat Uri, and, Uri, begat Bezalel.
text.KJV: And Hur begat Uri, and Uri begat Bezaleel.
text.NABRE: Hur became the father of Uri, and Uri became the father of Bezalel.
text.DRB: Moreover Hur begat Uri, and Uri begat Bezeleel.

text.NRSV: Afterward Hezron went in to the daughter of Machir father of Gilead, whom he married when he was sixty years old; and she bore him Segub.
text.Rotherham: And, afterward, Hezron went in unto the daughter of Machir, father of Gilead, and he took her when he was sixty years old,—and she bare him Segub.
text.KJV: And afterward Hezron went in to the daughter of Machir the father of Gilead, whom he married when he was threescore years old; and she bare him Segub.
text.NABRE: Then Hezron had relations with the daughter of Machir, the father of Gilead, whom he married when he was sixty years old. She bore him Segub.
text.DRB: After these things Hesron went in to the daughter of Machir the father of Galaad, & took her, when he was threescore years old: who bare him Segub.

text.NRSV: And Segub became the father of Jair, who had twenty-three towns in the land of Gilead.
text.Rotherham: And, Segub, begat Jair,—who came to have twenty-three cities, in the land of Gilead;
text.KJV: And Segub begat Jair, who had three and twenty cities in the land of Gilead.
text.NABRE: Segub became the father of Jair, who possessed twenty-three cities in the land of Gilead.
text.DRB: But Segub also begat Jair, and possessed three and twenty cities in the Land of Galaad.

text.NRSV: But Geshur and Aram took from them Havvoth-jair, Kenath and its villages, sixty towns. All these were descendants of Machir, father of Gilead.
text.Rotherham: but Geshur and Aram took the towns of Jair from them, with Kenath and the villages thereof, sixty cities. All these, were the sons of Machir, father of Gilead.
text.KJV: And he took Geshur, and Aram, with the towns of Jair, from them, with Kenath, and the towns thereof, even threescore cities. All these belonged to the sons of Machir the father of Gilead.
text.NABRE: Geshur and Aram took from them the villages of Jair, that is, Kenath and its towns, sixty cities in all, which had belonged to the sons of Machir, the father of Gilead.
text.DRB: And he took Gessur, and Aram, the towns of Jair, and Canath, and the villages thereof, threescore cities, all these are the sons of Machir the father of Galaad.

text.NRSV: After the death of Hezron, in Caleb-ephrathah, Abijah wife of Hezron bore him Ashhur, father of Tekoa.
text.Rotherham: And, after the death of Hezron, Caleb entered Ephrathah,—and, the wife of Hezron, was Abiah, who bare him Ashur, father of Tekoa.
text.KJV: And after that Hezron was dead in Caleb–ephratah, then Abiah Hezron’s wife bare him Ashur the father of Tekoa.
text.NABRE: After the death of Hezron, Caleb had relations with Ephrathah, the widow of his father Hezron, and she bore him Ashhur, the father of Tekoa.
text.DRB: And when Hesron was dead, Caleb went into Ephrata. Hesron also had to wife, Abia, who bare him Ashur the father of Thecua.

text.NRSV: The sons of Jerahmeel, the firstborn of Hezron: Ram his firstborn, Bunah, Oren, Ozem, and Ahijah.
text.Rotherham: And the sons of Jerahmeel firstborn of Hezron were, the firstborn, Ram,—and Bunah, and Oren, and Ozem [of] Ahijah.
text.KJV: And the sons of Jerahmeel the firstborn of Hezron were, Ram the firstborn, and Bunah, and Oren, and Ozem, and Ahijah.
text.NABRE: The sons of Jerahmeel, the firstborn of Hezron, were Ram, the firstborn, then Bunah, Oren, and Ozem, his brothers.
text.DRB: And there were born sons to Jerameel, the first-begotten of Hesron, Ram his first-born, and Buna, and Aram, and Asom, and Achia.

text.NRSV: Jerahmeel also had another wife, whose name was Atarah; she was the mother of Onam.
text.Rotherham: And Jerahmeel had another wife, whose name, was Atarah,—the same, was the mother of Onam.
text.KJV: Jerahmeel had also another wife, whose name was Atarah; she was the mother of Onam.
text.NABRE: Jerahmeel also had another wife, named Atarah, who was the mother of Onam.
text.DRB: Jerameel married also another wife, named Atara, which was the mother of Onam.

text.NRSV: The sons of Ram, the firstborn of Jerahmeel: Maaz, Jamin, and Eker.
text.Rotherham: And the sons of Ram, the firstborn of Jerameel, were,—Maaz and Jamin, and Eker.
text.KJV: And the sons of Ram the firstborn of Jerahmeel were, Maaz, and Jamin, and Eker.
text.NABRE: The sons of Ram, the firstborn of Jerahmeel, were Maaz, Jamin, and Eker.
text.DRB: But the sons also of Ram the first-begotten of Jerameel, were Moos, Jamin, and Acar.

text.NRSV: The sons of Onam: Shammai and Jada. The sons of Shammai: Nadab and Abishur.
text.Rotherham: And the sons of Onam were, Shammai and Jada,—and, the sons of Shammai, Nadab and Abishur.
text.KJV: And the sons of Onam were, Shammai, and Jada. And the sons of Shammai; Nadab, and Abishur.
text.NABRE: The sons of Onam were Shammai and Jada. The sons of Shammai were Nadab and Abishur.
text.DRB: And Onam had sons Semei, & Jada. And the sons of Semei: Nadab, and Abisur:

text.NRSV: The name of Abishur’s wife was Abihail, and she bore him Ahban and Molid.
text.Rotherham: And, the name of the wife of Abishur, was Abihail,—and she bare him Ahban, and Molid.
text.KJV: And the name of the wife of Abishur was Abihail, and she bare him Ahban, and Molid.
text.NABRE: Abishur’s wife, who was named Abihail, bore him Ahban and Molid.
text.DRB: But the name of Abisur's wife, was Abihail, who bare him Ahobban, & Molid.

text.NRSV: The sons of Nadab: Seled and Appaim; and Seled died childless.
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Nadab, Seled and Appaim,—but Seled died without sons.
text.KJV: And the sons of Nadab; Seled, and Appaim: but Seled died without children.
text.NABRE: The sons of Nadab were Seled and Appaim. Seled died childless.
text.DRB: And the sons of Nadab were Saled, and Apphaim. And Saled died without children.

text.NRSV: The son of Appaim: Ishi. The son of Ishi: Sheshan. The son of Sheshan: Ahlai.
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Appaim, Ishi, and, the sons of Ishi, Sheshan, and, the sons of Sheshan, Ahlai.
text.KJV: And the sons of Appaim; Ishi. And the sons of Ishi; Sheshan. And the children of Sheshan; Ahlai.
text.NABRE: The sons of Appaim: Ishi. The sons of Ishi: Sheshan. The sons of Sheshan: Ahlai.
text.DRB: But the son of Apphaim, Jesi: which Jesi begat Sesan. Moreover Sesan begat Oholai.

text.NRSV: The sons of Jada, Shammai’s brother: Jether and Jonathan; and Jether died childless.
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Jada, brother of Shammai, Jether, and Jonathan,—but Jether died without sons.
text.KJV: And the sons of Jada the brother of Shammai; Jether, and Jonathan: and Jether died without children.
text.NABRE: The sons of Jada, the brother of Shammai, were Jether and Jonathan. Jether died childless.
text.DRB: And the sons of Jada the brother of Semei: Jether, and Jonathan. But Jether also died without children.

text.NRSV: The sons of Jonathan: Peleth and Zaza. These were the descendants of Jerahmeel.
text.Rotherham: And the sons of Jonathan, Peleth and Zaza. These, were the sons of Jerahmeel.
text.KJV: And the sons of Jonathan; Peleth, and Zaza. These were the sons of Jerahmeel.
text.NABRE: The sons of Jonathan were Peleth and Zaza. These were the sons of Jerahmeel.
text.DRB: Moreover Jonathan begat Phaleth, and Ziza. These were the sons of Jerameel.

text.NRSV: Now Sheshan had no sons, only daughters; but Sheshan had an Egyptian slave, whose name was Jarha.
text.Rotherham: Now Sheshan had, no sons, but, daughters,—and, Sheshan, had a servant, an Egyptian, whose name was Jarha;
text.KJV: Now Sheshan had no sons, but daughters. And Sheshan had a servant, an Egyptian, whose name was Jarha.
text.NABRE: Sheshan had no sons, only daughters; he had an Egyptian slave named Jarha.
text.DRB: And Sesan had no sons, but daughters: and a servant an Ægyptian, named Jeraa.

text.NRSV: So Sheshan gave his daughter in marriage to his slave Jarha; and she bore him Attai.
text.Rotherham: so Sheshan gave his daughter to Jarha his servant, to wife,—and she bare him Attai.
text.KJV: And Sheshan gave his daughter to Jarha his servant to wife; and she bare him Attai.
text.NABRE: Sheshan gave his daughter in marriage to his slave Jarha, and she bore him Attai.
text.DRB: And he gave him his daughter to wife: who bare him Ethei.

text.NRSV: Attai became the father of Nathan, and Nathan became the father of Zabad.
text.Rotherham: And, Attai, begat Nathan, and, Nathan, begat Zabad;
text.KJV: And Attai begat Nathan, and Nathan begat Zabad,
text.NABRE: Attai became the father of Nathan. Nathan became the father of Zabad.
text.DRB: And Ethei begat Nathan, and Nathan begat Zabad,

text.NRSV: Zabad became the father of Ephlal, and Ephlal became the father of Obed.
text.Rotherham: and, Zabad, begat Ephlal, and, Ephlal, begat Obed;
text.KJV: And Zabad begat Ephlal, and Ephlal begat Obed,
text.NABRE: Zabad became the father of Ephlal. Ephlal became the father of Obed.
text.DRB: Zabad also begat Ophlal, and Ophlal begat Obed.

text.NRSV: Obed became the father of Jehu, and Jehu became the father of Azariah.
text.Rotherham: and, Obed, begat Jehu, and, Jehu, begat Azariah;
text.KJV: And Obed begat Jehu, and Jehu begat Azariah,
text.NABRE: Obed became the father of Jehu. Jehu became the father of Azariah.
text.DRB: Obed begat Jehu, Jehu begat Azarias,

text.NRSV: Azariah became the father of Helez, and Helez became the father of Eleasah.
text.Rotherham: and, Azariah, begat Helez, and, Helez, begat Eleasah;
text.KJV: And Azariah begat Helez, and Helez begat Eleasah,
text.NABRE: Azariah became the father of Helez. Helez became the father of Eleasah.
text.DRB: Azarias begat Helles, and Helles begat Elasa,

text.NRSV: Eleasah became the father of Sismai, and Sismai became the father of Shallum.
text.Rotherham: and, Eleasah, begat Sismai, and, Sismai, begat Shallum;
text.KJV: And Eleasah begat Sisamai, and Sisamai begat Shallum,
text.NABRE: Eleasah became the father of Sismai. Sismai became the father of Shallum.
text.DRB: Elasa begat Sisamoi, Sisamoi begat Sellum,

text.NRSV: Shallum became the father of Jekamiah, and Jekamiah became the father of Elishama.
text.Rotherham: and, Shallum, begat Jekamiah, and, Jekamiah, begat Elishama.
text.KJV: And Shallum begat Jekamiah, and Jekamiah begat Elishama.
text.NABRE: Shallum became the father of Jekamiah. Jekamiah became the father of Elishama.
text.DRB: Sellum begat Icamia, and Icamia begat Elisama.

text.NRSV: The sons of Caleb brother of Jerahmeel: Mesha his firstborn, who was the father of Ziph. The sons of Mareshah father of Hebron.
text.Rotherham: Now, the sons of Caleb, brother of Jerahmeel, were, Mesha his firstborn, the same, was the father of Ziph,—and the sons of Mareshah the father of Hebron.
text.KJV: Now the sons of Caleb the brother of Jerahmeel were, Mesha his firstborn, which was the father of Ziph; and the sons of Mareshah the father of Hebron.
text.NABRE: The sons of Caleb, the brother of Jerahmeel: Mesha his firstborn, who was the father of Ziph. Then the sons of Mareshah, who was the father of Hebron.
text.DRB: And the sons of Caleb the brother of Jerameel: Mesa his first-begotten, he is the father of Ziph: & the sons of Maresa the father of Hebron.

text.NRSV: The sons of Hebron: Korah, Tappuah, Rekem, and Shema.
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Hebron, Korah and Tappuah, and Rekem and Shema.
text.KJV: And the sons of Hebron; Korah, and Tappuah, and Rekem, and Shema.
text.NABRE: The sons of Hebron were Korah, Tappuah, Rekem, and Shema.
text.DRB: Moreover the sons of Hebron, Core, and Thaphua, and Recem, and Samma.

text.NRSV: Shema became the father of Raham, father of Jorkeam; and Rekem became the father of Shammai.
text.Rotherham: And, Shema, begat Raham, the father of Jorkeam,—and, Rekem, begat Shammai.
text.KJV: And Shema begat Raham, the father of Jorkoam: and Rekem begat Shammai.
text.NABRE: Shema became the father of Raham, who was the father of Jorkeam. Rekem became the father of Shammai.
text.DRB: And Samma begat Raham, the father of Jercaam, and Recem begat Sammai.

text.NRSV: The son of Shammai: Maon; and Maon was the father of Beth-zur.
text.Rotherham: And, the son of Shammai, was Maon,—and, Maon, was the father of Beth-zur.
text.KJV: And the son of Shammai was Maon: and Maon was the father of Beth–zur.
text.NABRE: The son of Shammai: Maon, who was the father of Beth-zur.
text.DRB: The son of Sammai, Maon: and Maon the father of Bethsur.

text.NRSV: Ephah also, Caleb’s concubine, bore Haran, Moza, and Gazez; and Haran became the father of Gazez.
text.Rotherham: And, Ephah, the concubine of Caleb, bare Haran and Moza, and Gazez,—and, Haran, begat Gazez.
text.KJV: And Ephah, Caleb’s concubine, bare Haran, and Moza, and Gazez: and Haran begat Gazez.
text.NABRE: Ephah, Caleb’s concubine, bore Haran, Moza, and Gazez. Haran became the father of Gazez.
text.DRB: And Epha the concubine of Caleb bare Haran, and Mosa, and Gezez. Moreover Haran begat Gezez.

text.NRSV: The sons of Jahdai: Regem, Jotham, Geshan, Pelet, Ephah, and Shaaph.
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Jahdai, Regem and Jotham and Geshan and Pelet, and Ephah and Shaaph.
text.KJV: And the sons of Jahdai; Regem, and Jotham, and Geshan, and Pelet, and Ephah, and Shaaph.
text.NABRE: The sons of Jahdai were Regem, Jotham, Geshan, Pelet, Ephah, and Shaaph.
text.DRB: And the sons of Jahaddai, Regom, and Joathan, and Gesan, and Phalet, and Epha, and Saaph.

text.NRSV: Maacah, Caleb’s concubine, bore Sheber and Tirhanah.
text.Rotherham: A concubine of Caleb, Maacah, bare Sheber, and Tirhanah;
text.KJV: Maachah, Caleb’s concubine, bare Sheber, and Tirhanah.
text.NABRE: Maacah, Caleb’s concubine, bore Sheber and Tirhanah.
text.DRB: The concubine of Caleb Maacha bare Saber, and Tharana.

text.NRSV: She also bore Shaaph father of Madmannah, Sheva father of Machbenah and father of Gibea; and the daughter of Caleb was Achsah.
text.Rotherham: she also bare Shaaph, father of Madmannah, Sheva, father of Machbena, and father of Gibea,—and, the daughter of Caleb, was Achsah.
text.KJV: She bare also Shaaph the father of Madmannah, Sheva the father of Machbenah, and the father of Gibea: and the daughter of Caleb was Achsah.
text.NABRE: She also bore Shaaph, the father of Madmannah, Sheva, the father of Machbenah, and the father of Gibea. Achsah was Caleb’s daughter.
text.DRB: And Saaph the father of Madmena begat Sue the father of Machbena, and the father of Gabaa. But the daughter of Caleb, was Achsa.

text.NRSV: These were the descendants of Caleb. The sons of Hur the firstborn of Ephrathah: Shobal father of Kiriath-jearim,
text.Rotherham: These, were the sons of Caleb, sons of Hur, firstborn of Ephrathah,—Shobal, the father of Kiriath-jearim;
text.KJV: These were the sons of Caleb the son of Hur, the firstborn of Ephratah; Shobal the father of Kirjath–jearim,
text.NABRE: These were sons of Caleb, sons of Hur, the firstborn of Ephrathah: Shobal, the father of Kiriath-jearim,
text.DRB: These were the sons of Caleb the son of Hur the first-begotten of Ephrata, Sobal the father of Cariathiarim.

text.NRSV: Salma father of Bethlehem, and Hareph father of Beth-gader.
text.Rotherham: Salma, the father of Bethlehem, Hareph, the father of Beth-gader.
text.KJV: Salma the father of Beth–lehem, Hareph the father of Beth–gader.
text.NABRE: Salma, the father of Bethlehem, and Hareph, the father of Bethgader.
text.DRB: Salma the father of Bethlehem, Hariph the father of Bethgader.

text.NRSV: Shobal father of Kiriath-jearim had other descendants: Haroeh, half of the Menuhoth.
text.Rotherham: And Shobal, the father of Kiriath-jearim had sons,—Haroeh, half of the Menuhoth.
text.KJV: And Shobal the father of Kirjath–jearim had sons; Haroeh, and half of the Manahethites.
text.NABRE: The sons of Shobal, the father of Kiriath-jearim, were Reaiah, half of the Manahathites,
text.DRB: And there were sons of Sobal the father of Chariathiarim, he that saw the half of the restings.

text.NRSV: And the families of Kiriath-jearim: the Ithrites, the Puthites, the Shumathites, and the Mishraites; from these came the Zorathites and the Eshtaolites.
text.Rotherham: And, the families of Kiriath-jearim, were the Ithrites, and the Puthites, and the Shumathites, and the Mishraites,—from these, came the Zorathites, and the Eshtaolites.
text.KJV: And the families of Kirjath–jearim; the Ithrites, and the Puhites, and the Shumathites, and the Mishraites; of them came the Zareathites, and the Eshtaulites.
text.NABRE: and the clans of Kiriath-jearim: the Ithrites, the Puthites, the Shumathites, and the Mishraites. From these the Zorahites and the Eshtaolites derived.
text.DRB: And of the kindred of Cariathiarim, the Jethrites, and Aphuthites, and Semathites, and Maseretes. Out of these issued the Saraites, and Esthaolites.

text.NRSV: The sons of Salma: Bethlehem, the Netophathites, Atroth-beth-joab, and half of the Manahathites, the Zorites.
text.Rotherham: The sons of Salma, were Bethlehem, and the Netophathites, Atrothbeth-joab,—and half of the Manahathites, the Zorites;
text.KJV: The sons of Salma; Beth–lehem, and the Netophathites, Ataroth, the house of Joab, and half of the Manahethites, the Zorites.
text.NABRE: The sons of Salma were Bethlehem, the Netophathites, Atroth-beth-Joab, half of the Manahathites, and the Zorites.
text.DRB: The sons of Salma, Bethlehem, and Netophathi, the Crowns of the house of Joab, and the Half of the resting of Sarai.

text.NRSV: The families also of the scribes that lived at Jabez: the Tirathites, the Shimeathites, and the Sucathites. These are the Kenites who came from Hammath, father of the house of Rechab.
text.Rotherham: and the families of scribes who dwelt at Jabez, the Tirathites, the Shimeathites, the Sucathites. The same, are the Kenites who came in from Hammath, father of the house of Rechab.
text.KJV: And the families of the scribes which dwelt at Jabez; the Tirathites, the Shimeathites, and Suchathites. These are the Kenites that came of Hemath, the father of the house of Rechab.
text.NABRE: The clans of the Sopherim dwelling in Jabez were the Tirathites, the Shimeathites, and the Sucathites. They were the Kenites, who descended from Hammath, the ancestor of the Rechabites.
text.DRB: The kindreds also of the scribes dwelling in Jabes, singing and sounding, and abiding in tabernacles. These are the Cineites, which came from Heate of the father of the house of Rechab.

text.NRSV: These are the sons of David who were born to him in Hebron: the firstborn Amnon, by Ahinoam the Jezreelite; the second Daniel, by Abigail the Carmelite;
text.Rotherham: Now, these, were the sons of David, who were born to him in Hebron,—the firstborn, Amnon, by Ahinoam the Jezreelitess, the second, Daniel, by Abigail the Carmelitess;
text.KJV: Now these were the sons of David, which were born unto him in Hebron; the firstborn Amnon, of Ahinoam the Jezreelitess; the second Daniel, of Abigail the Carmelitess:
text.NABRE: Chapter 3 These were the sons of David born to him in Hebron: the firstborn, Amnon, by Ahinoam of Jezreel; the second, Daniel, by Abigail of Carmel;
text.DRB: But David had these sons, which were born to him in Hebron: the first begotten Amnon of Achinoam the Jesraelite, the second Daniel of Abigail the Carmelite,

text.NRSV: the third Absalom son of Maacah, daughter of King Talmai of Geshur; the fourth Adonijah son of Haggith;
text.Rotherham: the third, Absalom, son of Maacah, daughter of Talmai, king of Geshur,—the fourth, Adonijah, son of Haggith;
text.KJV: The third, Absalom the son of Maachah the daughter of Talmai king of Geshur: the fourth, Adonijah the son of Haggith:
text.NABRE: the third, Absalom, son of Maacah, who was the daughter of Talmai, king of Geshur; the fourth, Adonijah, son of Haggith;
text.DRB: the third Absalom the son of Maacha the daughter of Tolmai the king of Gessur, the fourth Adonias the son of Aggith,

text.NRSV: the fifth Shephatiah, by Abital; the sixth Ithream, by his wife Eglah;
text.Rotherham: the fifth, Shephatiah, by Abital,—the sixth, Ithream, by Eglah his wife:
text.KJV: The fifth, Shephatiah of Abital: the sixth, Ithream by Eglah his wife.
text.NABRE: the fifth, Shephatiah, by Abital; the sixth, Ithream, by his wife Eglah.
text.DRB: the fifth Saphatias of Abital, the sixth Jethraham of Egla his wife.

text.NRSV: six were born to him in Hebron, where he reigned for seven years and six months. And he reigned thirty-three years in Jerusalem.
text.Rotherham: six born to him in Hebron, and he reigned there, seven years and six months. And, thirty and three years, reigned he, in Jerusalem.
text.KJV: These six were born unto him in Hebron; and there he reigned seven years and six months: and in Jerusalem he reigned thirty and three years.
text.NABRE: Six in all were born to him in Hebron, where he reigned seven years and six months. Then he reigned thirty-three years in Jerusalem.
text.DRB: Six sons therefore were born to him in Hebron, where he reigned seven years and six months. And in Jerusalem he reigned three and thirty years.

text.NRSV: These were born to him in Jerusalem: Shimea, Shobab, Nathan, and Solomon, four by Bath-shua, daughter of Ammiel;
text.Rotherham: And, these, were born to him in Jerusalem, Shimea, and Shobab, and Nathan, and Solomon—four, by Bathshua, daughter of Ammiel;
text.KJV: And these were born unto him in Jerusalem; Shimea, and Shobab, and Nathan, and Solomon, four, of Bath–shua the daughter of Ammiel:
text.NABRE: In Jerusalem the following were born to him: Shimea, Shobab, Nathan, Solomon—four by Bathsheba, the daughter of Ammiel;
text.DRB: Moreover in Jerusalem sons were born to him, Simmaa, and Sobab, and Nathan, and Salomon, four of Bethsabee the daughter of Ammiel,

text.NRSV: then Ibhar, Elishama, Eliphelet,
text.Rotherham: and Ibhar, and Elishama, and Eliphelet,
text.KJV: Ibhar also, and Elishama, and Eliphelet,
text.NABRE: Ibhar, Elishua, Eliphelet,
text.DRB: Jebaar also and Elisama,

text.NRSV: Nogah, Nepheg, Japhia,
text.Rotherham: and Nogah, and Nepheg, and Japhia,
text.KJV: And Nogah, and Nepheg, and Japhia,
text.NABRE: Nogah, Nepheg, Japhia,
text.DRB: and Eliphaleth, and Noge, and Nepheg, and Japhia,

text.NRSV: Elishama, Eliada, and Eliphelet, nine.
text.Rotherham: and Elishama, and Eliada, and Eliphelet—nine.
text.KJV: And Elishama, and Eliada, and Eliphelet, nine.
text.NABRE: Elishama, Eliada, and Eliphelet—nine.
text.DRB: moreover Elisama, and Eliada, and Elipheleth, nine:

text.NRSV: All these were David’s sons, besides the sons of the concubines; and Tamar was their sister.
text.Rotherham: All, sons of David,—besides sons of concubines, and, Tamar, their sister.
text.KJV: These were all the sons of David, beside the sons of the concubines, and Tamar their sister.
text.NABRE: All these were sons of David, in addition to other sons by concubines; and Tamar was their sister.
text.DRB: all these the sons of David, beside the sons of his concubines: and they had a sister Thamar.

text.NRSV: The descendants of Solomon: Rehoboam, Abijah his son, Asa his son, Jehoshaphat his son,
text.Rotherham: And, the son of Solomon, was Rehoboam,—Abijah his son, Asa his son, Jehoshaphat his son;
text.KJV: And Solomon’s son was Rehoboam, Abia his son, Asa his son, Jehoshaphat his son,
text.NABRE: The son of Solomon was Rehoboam, whose son was Abijah, whose son was Asa, whose son was Jehoshaphat,
text.DRB: And the son of Salomon, Roboam: whose son Abia begat Asa. Of this also was born Josaphat,

text.NRSV: Joram his son, Ahaziah his son, Joash his son,
text.Rotherham: Joram his son, Ahaziah his son, Joash his son;
text.KJV: Joram his son, Ahaziah his son, Joash his son,
text.NABRE: whose son was Joram, whose son was Ahaziah, whose son was Joash,
text.DRB: the father of Joram: which Joram begat Ochozias, of whom rose Joas:

text.NRSV: Amaziah his son, Azariah his son, Jotham his son,
text.Rotherham: Amaziah his son, Azariah his son, Jotham his son;
text.KJV: Amaziah his son, Azariah his son, Jotham his son,
text.NABRE: whose son was Amaziah, whose son was Azariah, whose son was Jotham,
text.DRB: and his son Amasias begat Azarias. Moreover Azarias the son of Joathan

text.NRSV: Ahaz his son, Hezekiah his son, Manasseh his son,
text.Rotherham: Ahaz his son, Hezekiah his son, Manasseh his son;
text.KJV: Ahaz his son, Hezekiah his son, Manasseh his son,
text.NABRE: whose son was Ahaz, whose son was Hezekiah, whose son was Manasseh,
text.DRB: begat Achaz, the father of Ezechias, of whom was born Manasses.

text.NRSV: Amon his son, Josiah his son.
text.Rotherham: Amon his son, Josiah his son.
text.KJV: Amon his son, Josiah his son.
text.NABRE: whose son was Amon, whose son was Josiah.
text.DRB: But Manasses also begat Amon the father of Josias.

text.NRSV: The sons of Josiah: Johanan the firstborn, the second Jehoiakim, the third Zedekiah, the fourth Shallum.
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Josiah, the firstborn, Johanan, the second, Jehoiakim,—the third, Zedekiah, the fourth, Shallum.
text.KJV: And the sons of Josiah were, the firstborn Johanan, the second Jehoiakim, the third Zedekiah, the fourth Shallum.
text.NABRE: The sons of Josiah were: the firstborn Johanan; the second, Jehoiakim; the third, Zedekiah; the fourth, Shallum.
text.DRB: And the sons of Josias were, the firstbegotten Johanam, the second Joakim, the third Sedecias, the fourth Sellum.

text.NRSV: The descendants of Jehoiakim: Jeconiah his son, Zedekiah his son;
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Jehoiakim,—Jeconiah his son, Zedekiah his son.
text.KJV: And the sons of Jehoiakim: Jeconiah his son, Zedekiah his son.
text.NABRE: The sons of Jehoiakim were: Jeconiah, his son; Zedekiah, his son.
text.DRB: Of Joakim was born Jechonias, and Sedecias.

text.NRSV: and the sons of Jeconiah, the captive: Shealtiel his son,
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Jeconiah the captive, Shealtiel his son;
text.KJV: And the sons of Jeconiah; Assir, Salathiel his son,
text.NABRE: The sons of Jeconiah the captive were: Shealtiel,
text.DRB: The sons of Jechonias were Asir, Salathiel,

text.NRSV: Malchiram, Pedaiah, Shenazzar, Jekamiah, Hoshama, and Nedabiah;
text.Rotherham: and Malchiram, and Pedaiah, and Shenazzar,—Jekamiah, Hoshama, and Nedabiah.
text.KJV: Malchiram also, and Pedaiah, and Shenazar, Jecamiah, Hoshama, and Nedabiah.
text.NABRE: Malchiram, Pedaiah, Shenazzar, Jekamiah, Hoshama, and Nedabiah.
text.DRB: Melchiram, Phadaia, Senneser and Jecemia, Sama, and Nadabia.

text.NRSV: the sons of Pedaiah: Zerubbabel and Shimei; and the sons of Zerubbabel: Meshullam and Hananiah, and Shelomith was their sister;
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Pedaiah, Zerubbabel, and Shimei,—and, the sons of Zerubbabel, Meshullam, and Hananiah, and, Shelomith, was their sister;
text.KJV: And the sons of Pedaiah were, Zerubbabel, and Shimei: and the sons of Zerubbabel; Meshullam, and Hananiah, and Shelomith their sister:
text.NABRE: The sons of Pedaiah were Zerubbabel and Shimei. The sons of Zerubbabel were Meshullam and Hananiah; Shelomith was their sister.
text.DRB: Of Phadaia were born Zorobabel and Semei. Zorobabel begat Mosollom, Hananias, and Salomith their sister:

text.NRSV: and Hashubah, Ohel, Berechiah, Hasadiah, and Jushab-hesed, five.
text.Rotherham: and Hashubah, and Ohel, and Berechiah, and Hasadiah, Jushab-hesed—five.
text.KJV: And Hashubah, and Ohel, and Berechiah, and Hasadiah, Jushab–hesed, five.
text.NABRE: The sons of Meshullam were Hashubah, Ohel, Berechiah, Hasadiah, Jushabhesed—five.
text.DRB: Hasaba also, and Ohol, and Barachias, and Hasadias, Josabhesed, five.

text.NRSV: The sons of Hananiah: Pelatiah and Jeshaiah, his son Rephaiah, his son Arnan, his son Obadiah, his son Shecaniah.
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Hananiah, Pelatiah, and Jeshaiah,—the sons of Rephaiah, the sons of Arnan, the sons of Obadiah, the sons of Shecaniah;
text.KJV: And the sons of Hananiah; Pelatiah, and Jesaiah: the sons of Rephaiah, the sons of Arnan, the sons of Obadiah, the sons of Shechaniah.
text.NABRE: The sons of Hananiah were Pelatiah, Jeshaiah, Rephaiah, Arnan, Obadiah, and Shecaniah.
text.DRB: And the son of Hananias, Phaltias the father of Jeseias, whose son was Raphaia. This man's son also Arnan, of whom was born Obdia, whose son was Sechenias.

text.NRSV: The son of Shecaniah: Shemaiah. And the sons of Shemaiah: Hattush, Igal, Bariah, Neariah, and Shaphat, six.
text.Rotherham: and, the sons of Shecaniah, Shemaiah,—and, the sons of Shemaiah, Hattush, and Igal, and Bariah, and Neariah, and Shaphat—six;
text.KJV: And the sons of Shechaniah; Shemaiah: and the sons of Shemaiah; Hattush, and Igeal, and Bariah, and Neariah, and Shaphat, six.
text.NABRE: The sons of Shecaniah were Shemaiah, Hattush, Igal, Bariah, Neariah, Shaphat—six.
text.DRB: The son of Sechenias: Semeia, whose sons were Hattus, and Jegaal, and Baria, and Naaria, & Saphat, six in number.

text.NRSV: The sons of Neariah: Elioenai, Hizkiah, and Azrikam, three.
text.Rotherham: and, the son of Neariah, Elioenai, and Hizkiah, and Azrikam—three;
text.KJV: And the sons of Neariah; Elioenai, and Hezekiah, and Azrikam, three.
text.NABRE: The sons of Neariah were Elioenai, Hizkiah, and Azrikam—three.
text.DRB: The sons of Naaria, Elioenai, and Ezechias, and Ezricam, three.

text.NRSV: The sons of Elioenai: Hodaviah, Eliashib, Pelaiah, Akkub, Johanan, Delaiah, and Anani, seven.
text.Rotherham: and, the sons of Elioenai, Hodaviah, and Eliashib, and Pelaiah, and Akkub, and Johanan, and Delaiah, and Anani—seven.
text.KJV: And the sons of Elioenai were, Hodaiah, and Eliashib, and Pelaiah, and Akkub, and Johanan, and Dalaiah, and Anani, seven.
text.NABRE: The sons of Elioenai were Hodaviah, Eliashib, Pelaiah, Akkub, Johanan, Delaiah, and Anani—seven.
text.DRB: The sons of Elioenai, Oduia, and Eliasub, & Pheleia, and Accub, and Johanan, and Dalaia, and Anani, seven.

text.NRSV: The sons of Judah: Perez, Hezron, Carmi, Hur, and Shobal.
text.Rotherham: the sons of Judah, Perez, Hezron, and Carmi, and Hur, and Shobal.
text.KJV: The sons of Judah; Pharez, Hezron, and Carmi, and Hur, and Shobal.
text.NABRE: Chapter 4 The sons of Judah were: Perez, Hezron, Carmi, Hur, and Shobal.
text.DRB: The sons of Juda: Phares, Hesron, and Charmi, and Hur, and Sobal.

text.NRSV: Reaiah son of Shobal became the father of Jahath, and Jahath became the father of Ahumai and Lahad. These were the families of the Zorathites.
text.Rotherham: And, Reaiah son of Shobal, begat Jahath, and, Jahath, begat Ahumai, and Lahad. These, are the families of the Zorathites.
text.KJV: And Reaiah the son of Shobal begat Jahath; and Jahath begat Ahumai, and Lahad. These are the families of the Zorathites.
text.NABRE: Reaiah, the son of Shobal, became the father of Jahath, and Jahath became the father of Ahumai and Lahad. These were the clans of the Zorathites.
text.DRB: But Raia the son of Sobal begat Jahath, of whom were born Ahumai, and Laad. These be the kindreds of Sarathi.

text.NRSV: These were the sons of Etam: Jezreel, Ishma, and Idbash; and the name of their sister was Hazzelelponi,
text.Rotherham: And, these, were the sons of Etam, Jezreel and Ishma, and Idbash,—and, the name of their sister, was Hazzelelponi;
text.KJV: And these were of the father of Etam; Jezreel, and Ishma, and Idbash: and the name of their sister was Hazelelponi:
text.NABRE: These were the sons of Hareph, the father of Etam: Jezreel, Ishma, and Idbash; their sister was named Hazzelelponi.
text.DRB: This also is the stock of Etam: Jezrahel, and Jesema, and Jedebos. And the name of their sister Asalelphuni.

text.NRSV: and Penuel was the father of Gedor, and Ezer the father of Hushah. These were the sons of Hur, the firstborn of Ephrathah, the father of Bethlehem.
text.Rotherham: and Penuel the father of Gedor, and Ezer, the father of Hushah. These, are the sons of Hur, the firstborn of Ephrathah, the father of Bethlehem.
text.KJV: And Penuel the father of Gedor, and Ezer the father of Hushah. These are the sons of Hur, the firstborn of Ephratah, the father of Beth–lehem.
text.NABRE: Penuel was the father of Gedor, and Ezer the father of Hushah. These were the sons of Hur, the firstborn of Ephrathah, the father of Bethlehem.
text.DRB: And Phanuel the father of Gedor, and Ezar the father of Hosa, these are the sons of Hur the first begotten of Ephratha the father of Bethlehem.

text.NRSV: Ashhur father of Tekoa had two wives, Helah and Naarah;
text.Rotherham: And, Ashhur the father of Tekoa, had two wives,—Helah, and Naarah.
text.KJV: And Ashur the father of Tekoa had two wives, Helah and Naarah.
text.NABRE: Ashhur, the father of Tekoa, had two wives, Helah and Naarah.
text.DRB: But Assur the father of Thecua had two wives, Halaa, and Naara.

text.NRSV: Naarah bore him Ahuzzam, Hepher, Temeni, and Haahashtari. These were the sons of Naarah.
text.Rotherham: And Naarah bare him Ahuzzam and Hepher, and Temeni, and Haahashtari. These, were the sons of Naarah.
text.KJV: And Naarah bare him Ahuzam, and Hepher, and Temeni, and Haahashtari. These were the sons of Naarah.
text.NABRE: Naarah bore him Ahuzzam, Hepher, the Temenites, and the Ahashtarites. These were the sons of Naarah.
text.DRB: And Naara bare him Oozam, and Hepher, and Themani, & Ahasthari. These are the sons of Naara.

text.NRSV: The sons of Helah: Zereth, Izhar, and Ethnan.
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Helah, were Zereth, Izhar, and Ethnan.
text.KJV: And the sons of Helah were, Zereth, and Jezoar, and Ethnan.
text.NABRE: The sons of Helah were Zereth, Izhar, Ethnan, and Koz.
text.DRB: Moreover the sons of Halaa, Sereth, Isaar, and Ethnan.

text.NRSV: Koz became the father of Anub, Zobebah, and the families of Aharhel son of Harum.
text.Rotherham: And, Koz, begat Anub, and Zobebah,—and the families of Aharhel, the son of Harum.
text.KJV: And Coz begat Anub, and Zobebah, and the families of Aharhel the son of Harum.
text.NABRE: Koz became the father of Anub and Zobebah, as well as of the clans of Aharhel, son of Harum.
text.DRB: And Cos begat Anob, and Soboba, and the kindred of Aharehel the son of Arum.

text.NRSV: Jabez was honored more than his brothers; and his mother named him Jabez, saying, “Because I bore him in pain.”
text.Rotherham: Now it came to pass that Jabez was more honourable than his brethren,—but, his mother, had called his name Jabez, [="he causes pain"] saying, Because I bare him with pain.
text.KJV: And Jabez was more honourable than his brethren: and his mother called his name Jabez, saying, Because I bare him with sorrow.
text.NABRE: Jabez was the most distinguished of his brothers. His mother had named him Jabez, saying, “I bore him with pain.”
text.DRB: And Jabes was honorable above his brethren, and his mother called his name Jabes, saying: Because I bare him in sorrow.

text.NRSV: Jabez called on the God of Israel, saying, “Oh that you would bless me and enlarge my border, and that your hand might be with me, and that you would keep me from hurt and harm!” And God granted what he asked.
text.Rotherham: So then Jabez called on the God of Israel, saying, Oh that thou wouldst, indeed bless, me, and enlarge my boundary, and that thy hand might be with me,—and that thou wouldst work [to deliver me] from evil, that it be not my pain. And God brought about that which he asked.
text.KJV: And Jabez called on the God of Israel, saying, Oh that thou wouldest bless me indeed, and enlarge my coast, and that thine hand might be with me, and that thou wouldest keep me from evil, that it may not grieve me! And God granted him that which he requested.
text.NABRE: Jabez prayed to the God of Israel: “Oh, that you may truly bless me and extend my boundaries! May your hand be with me and make me free of misfortune, without pain!” And God granted his prayer.
text.DRB: But Jabes invocated the God of Israel, saying: If blessing thou wilt bless me, and wilt enlarge my borders, and thy hand be with me, and thou wilt make that I be not oppressed by malice. And God granted the things that he prayed for.

text.NRSV: Chelub the brother of Shuhah became the father of Mehir, who was the father of Eshton.
text.Rotherham: And, Chelub the brother of Shuhah, begat Mehir, the same, was the father of Eshton.
text.KJV: And Chelub the brother of Shuah begat Mehir, which was the father of Eshton.
text.NABRE: Chelub, the brother of Shuhah, became the father of Mehir, who was the father of Eshton.
text.DRB: And Caleb the brother of Sua begat Mahir, who was the father of Esthon.

text.NRSV: Eshton became the father of Beth-rapha, Paseah, and Tehinnah the father of Ir-nahash. These are the men of Recah.
text.Rotherham: And, Eshton, begat Beth-rapha, and Paseah, and Tehinnah, the father of Ir-nahash. These, are the men of Recah.
text.KJV: And Eshton begat Beth–rapha, and Paseah, and Tehinnah the father of Ir–nahash. These are the men of Rechah.
text.NABRE: Eshton became the father of Bethrapha, Paseah, and Tehinnah, the father of the city of Nahash. These were the men of Recah.
text.DRB: Moreover Esthon begat Bethrapha, and Phesse, and Tehinna the father of the city of Naas: these are the men of Recha.

text.NRSV: The sons of Kenaz: Othniel and Seraiah; and the sons of Othniel: Hathath and Meonothai.
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Kenaz, were Othniel, and Seraiah,—and, the sons of Othniel, Hathath.
text.KJV: And the sons of Kenaz; Othniel, and Seraiah: and the sons of Othniel; Hathath.
text.NABRE: The sons of Kenaz were Othniel and Seraiah. The sons of Othniel were Hathath and Meonothai;
text.DRB: And the sons of Cenez, Othoniel, and Saraia. Moreover the sons of Othoniel, Hathath, and Maonathi.

text.NRSV: Meonothai became the father of Ophrah; and Seraiah became the father of Joab father of Ge-harashim, so-called because they were artisans.
text.Rotherham: And, Meonothai, begat Ophrah,—and, Seraiah, begat Joab, the father of Ge-harashim, for they were, craftsmen.
text.KJV: And Meonothai begat Ophrah: and Seraiah begat Joab, the father of the valley of Charashim; for they were craftsmen.
text.NABRE: Meonothai became the father of Ophrah. Seraiah became the father of Joab, the father of Geharashim, so called because they were artisans.
text.DRB: Maonathi begat Ophra, and Saraia begat Joab the father of the Vale of Artificers: for there were artificers.

text.NRSV: The sons of Caleb son of Jephunneh: Iru, Elah, and Naam; and the son of Elah: Kenaz.
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Caleb son of Jephunneh, were Iru, Elah, and Naam,—and the sons of Elah and Kenaz.
text.KJV: And the sons of Caleb the son of Jephunneh; Iru, Elah, and Naam: and the sons of Elah, even Kenaz.
text.NABRE: The sons of Caleb, son of Jephunneh, were Ir, Elah, and Naam. The sons of Elah: Kenaz.
text.DRB: And the sons of Caleb the son of Jephone, Hir, & Ela, and Naham. The sons also of Ela: Cenez.

text.NRSV: The sons of Jehallelel: Ziph, Ziphah, Tiria, and Asarel.
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Jehallelel, Ziph and Ziphah, Tiria, and Asarel.
text.KJV: And the sons of Jehaleleel; Ziph, and Ziphah, Tiria, and Asareel.
text.NABRE: The sons of Jehallelel were Ziph, Ziphah, Tiria, and Asarel.
text.DRB: The sons also of Jaleleel: Ziph, and Zipha, Thiria, and Asrael.

text.NRSV: The sons of Ezrah: Jether, Mered, Epher, and Jalon. These are the sons of Bithiah, daughter of Pharaoh, whom Mered married; and she conceived and bore Miriam, Shammai, and Ishbah father of Eshtemoa.
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Ezrah, Jether and Mered, and Epher and Jalon. And, these, are the sons of Bithia, daughter of Pharaoh, whom Mered took,—and she conceived and bare Miriam and Shammai, and Ishbah, the father of Eshtemoa.
text.KJV: And the sons of Ezra were, Jether, and Mered, and Epher, and Jalon: and she bare Miriam, and Shammai, and Ishbah the father of Eshtemoa.
text.NABRE: The sons of Ezrah were Jether, Mered, Epher, and Jalon. Jether became the father of Miriam, Shammai, and Ishbah, the father of Eshtemoa.
text.DRB: And the sons of Esra, Jether, and Mered, and Epher, and Jalon, and he begat Mariam, and Sammai, and Jesba the father of Esthamo.

text.NRSV: And his Judean wife bore Jered father of Gedor, Heber father of Soco, and Jekuthiel father of Zanoah.
text.Rotherham: And, his wife, the Jewess, bare Jered the father of Gedor, and Heber the father of Soco, and Jekuthiel, the father of Zanoah.
text.KJV: And his wife Jehudijah bare Jered the father of Gedor, and Heber the father of Socho, and Jekuthiel the father of Zanoah. And these are the sons of Bithiah the daughter of Pharaoh, which Mered took.
text.NABRE: Mered’s Egyptian wife bore Jered, the father of Gedor, Heber, the father of Soco, and Jekuthiel, the father of Zanoah. These were the sons of Bithiah, the daughter of Pharaoh, whom Mered married.
text.DRB: Also his wife Judaia, bare Jared the father of Gedor, and Heber the father of Socho, and Icuthiel the father of Zanoe. And these are the sons of Bethia the daughter of Pharao, whom Mered took.

text.NRSV: The sons of the wife of Hodiah, the sister of Naham, were the fathers of Keilah the Garmite and Eshtemoa the Maacathite.
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of the wife of Hodiah, the sister of Naham, were the father of Keilah, the Garmite,—and Eshtemoa, the Maacathite.
text.KJV: And the sons of his wife Hodiah the sister of Naham, the father of Keilah the Garmite, and Eshtemoa the Maachathite.
text.NABRE: The sons of his Jewish wife, the sister of Naham, the father of Keilah, were Shimon the Garmite and Ishi the Maacathite.
text.DRB: And the sons of the wife of Odaia the sister of Naham the father of Ceila, Garmi, and Esthamo, which was of Macathi.

text.NRSV: The sons of Shimon: Amnon, Rinnah, Ben-hanan, and Tilon. The sons of Ishi: Zoheth and Ben-zoheth.
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Shimon, Amnon, and Rinnah, Ben-hanan and Tilon. And, the sons of Ishi, Zoheth, and Ben-zoheth.
text.KJV: And the sons of Shimon were, Amnon, and Rinnah, Ben–hanan, and Tilon. And the sons of Ishi were, Zoheth, and Ben–zoheth.
text.NABRE: The sons of Shimon were Amnon, Rinnah, Benhanan, and Tilon. The son of Ishi was Zoheth and the son of Zoheth….
text.DRB: The sons also Simon, Amnon, and Rinna the son of Hanan, and Thilon. And the sons of Jesi, Zoheth, and Benzoheth.

text.NRSV: The sons of Shelah son of Judah: Er father of Lecah, Laadah father of Mareshah, and the families of the guild of linen workers at Beth-ashbea;
text.Rotherham: the sons of Shelah, the son of Judah, Er, the father of Lecah, and Laadah, the father of Mareshah,—and the families of the house of them that wrought fine linen, of the house of Ashbea;
text.KJV: The sons of Shelah the son of Judah were, Er the father of Lecah, and Laadah the father of Mareshah, and the families of the house of them that wrought fine linen, of the house of Ashbea,
text.NABRE: The sons of Shelah, son of Judah, were: Er, the father of Lecah; Laadah, the father of Mareshah; the clans of the linen weavers’ guild in Bethashbea;
text.DRB: The sons of Sela the son of Juda: Her the father of Lecha, and Laada the father of Maresa, and the kindreds of their house that work silk in the House of oath.

text.NRSV: and Jokim, and the men of Cozeba, and Joash, and Saraph, who married into Moab and returned to Lehem (now the records are ancient).
text.Rotherham: and Jokim, and the men of Cozeba, and Joash, and Saraph who ruled for Moab, and Jashubi-lehem,—but, the records, are ancient.
text.KJV: And Jokim, and the men of Chozeba, and Joash, and Saraph, who had the dominion in Moab, and Jashubi–lehem. And these are ancient things.
text.NABRE: Jokim; the people of Cozeba; and Joash and Saraph, who held property in Moab, but returned to Bethlehem. (These are events of old.)
text.DRB: And he that made the Sun to stand, and the men of Lying, and Secure, and Burning, which were Princes in Moab, & which returned into Lahem. And these are old words.

text.NRSV: These were the potters and inhabitants of Netaim and Gederah; they lived there in the king’s service.
text.Rotherham: They, were the potters and the inhabitants of Netaim, and Gederah,—with the king in his work, dwelt they there.
text.KJV: These were the potters, and those that dwelt among plants and hedges: there they dwelt with the king for his work.
text.NABRE: They were potters and inhabitants of Netaim and Gederah, where they lived in the king’s service.
text.DRB: These are potters, dwelling in Plantings, and in Hedges, with the king in his works, and they abode there.

text.NRSV: The sons of Simeon: Nemuel, Jamin, Jarib, Zerah, Shaul;
text.Rotherham: The sons of Simeon, Nemuel, and Jamin, Jarib, Zerah, Shaul:
text.KJV: The sons of Simeon were, Nemuel, and Jamin, Jarib, Zerah, and Shaul:
text.NABRE: Simeon. The sons of Simeon were Nemuel, Jamin, Jachin, Zerah, and Shaul,
text.DRB: The sons of Simeon: Namuel, and Jamin, Jarib, Zara, Saul:

text.NRSV: Shallum was his son, Mibsam his son, Mishma his son.
text.Rotherham: Shallum his son, Mibsam his son, Mishma his son.
text.KJV: Shallum his son, Mibsam his son, Mishma his son.
text.NABRE: whose son was Shallum, whose son was Mibsam, whose son was Mishma.
text.DRB: Sellum his son, Mapsam his son, Masma his son.

text.NRSV: The sons of Mishma: Hammuel his son, Zaccur his son, Shimei his son.
text.Rotherham: And, the sons of Mishma, Hammuel his son, Zaccur his son, Shimei his son.
text.KJV: And the sons of Mishma; Hamuel his son, Zacchur his son, Shimei his son.
text.NABRE: The sons of Mishma were his son Hammuel, whose son was Zaccur, whose son was Shimei.
text.DRB: The sons of Masma: Hamuel his son, Zachur his son, Semei his son.

text.NRSV: Shimei had sixteen sons and six daughters; but his brothers did not have many children, nor did all their family multiply like the Judeans.
text.Rotherham: And, Shimei, had sixteen sons, and six daughters, but, his brethren, had not many children,—nor did, any of their family, multiply so much as the sons of Judah.
text.KJV: And Shimei had sixteen sons and six daughters; but his brethren had not many children, neither did all their family multiply, like to the children of Judah.
text.NABRE: Shimei had sixteen sons and six daughters. His brothers, however, did not have many sons, and as a result all their clans did not equal the number of the Judahites.
text.DRB: The sons of Semei sixteen, and six daughters: but his brethren had not many sons, and the whole kindred could not reach to the sum of the children of Juda.

text.NRSV: They lived in Beer-sheba, Moladah, Hazar-shual,
text.Rotherham: And they dwelt in Beer-sheba, and Moladah, and Hazar-shual;
text.KJV: And they dwelt at Beer–sheba, and Moladah, and Hazar–shual,
text.NABRE: They dwelt in Beer-sheba, Moladah, Hazar-shual,
text.DRB: And they dwelt in Bersabee, and Molada, and Hasarsuhal,

text.NRSV: Bilhah, Ezem, Tolad,
text.Rotherham: and in Bilhah, and in Ezem, and in Tolad;
text.KJV: And at Bilhah, and at Ezem, and at Tolad,
text.NABRE: Bilhah, Ezem, Tolad,
text.DRB: and in Bala, and in Asom, and in Tholad,

text.NRSV: Bethuel, Hormah, Ziklag,
text.Rotherham: and in Bethuel, and in Hormah, and in Ziklag;
text.KJV: And at Bethuel, and at Hormah, and at Ziklag,
text.NABRE: Bethuel, Hormah, Ziklag,
text.DRB: and in Bathuel, and in Hormi, and in Siceleg,

text.NRSV: Beth-marcaboth, Hazar-susim, Beth-biri, and Shaaraim. These were their towns until David became king.
text.Rotherham: and in Beth-marcaboth, and in Hazar-susim, and in Beth-biri, and in Shaaraim. These, were their cities unto the reign of David.
text.KJV: And at Beth–marcaboth, and Hazar–susim, and at Beth–birei, and at Shaaraim. These were their cities unto the reign of David.
text.NABRE: Beth-marcaboth, Hazar-susim, Bethbiri, and Shaaraim. Until the reign of David, these were their cities
text.DRB: and in Bethmarcaboth, and in Hasarsusim, and in Bethberai, and in Saarim. These were their cities until king David.

text.NRSV: And their villages were Etam, Ain, Rimmon, Tochen, and Ashan, five towns,
text.Rotherham: And, their villages, were Etam, and Ain, Rimmon, and Tochen, and Ashan,—five cities;
text.KJV: And their villages were, Etam, and Ain, Rimmon, and Tochen, and Ashan, five cities:
text.NABRE: and their villages. Etam, also, and Ain, Rimmon, Tochen, and Ashan—five cities,
text.DRB: Their towns also: Etam, & Æn, Rhemmon, and Thochen, and Asan, five cities.

text.NRSV: along with all their villages that were around these towns as far as Baal. These were their settlements. And they kept a genealogical record.
text.Rotherham: and all their villages that were round about these cities, as far as Baal. These, were their habitations, and they had their own genealogical register.
text.KJV: And all their villages that were round about the same cities, unto Baal. These were their habitations, and their genealogy.
text.NABRE: together with all their outlying villages as far as Baal. Here is where they dwelt, and so it was inscribed of them in their family records.
text.DRB: And all their villages round about these cities unto Baal. This is their habitation, and the distribution of their dwellings.

text.NRSV: Meshobab, Jamlech, Joshah son of Amaziah,
text.Rotherham: And Meshobab, and Jamlech, and Joshah, the son of Amaziah;
text.KJV: And Meshobab, and Jamlech, and Joshah the son of Amaziah,
text.NABRE: Meshobab, Jamlech, Joshah, son of Amaziah,
